quotes.text: Your morning routine doesn't matter if your evening routine is doomscrolling until 2 AM.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The 5 AM club only works if you go to bed at 9 PM. Most people who join it just lose 2 hours of sleep and call it discipline.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your morning routine should set the tone for the day, not drain your energy before it starts.
quotes.author: based
